title: Does Media Manipulate How People Experience UFOs?
summary: This interview segment discusses the relationship between media depictions of aliens and people's real-life UFO experiences. The conversation explores whether cultural narratives and media influence how witnesses perceive and describe their encounters, referencing academic works and historical examples.

events.description: Betty and Barney Hill abduction experience, which occurred 11 days after an Outer Limits episode depicting aliens with wraparound eyes aired on CBS

key_claims.claim: Media depictions of aliens and flying saucers were derived from people's real-life stories, not the other way around
The Outer Limits TV show aired 11 days before the Betty and Barney Hill abduction and depicted aliens with eyes that wrapped around the rims of their heads, which matched the Hills' description
The same underlying phenomenon has been interpreted differently across time periods - as witches in medieval times and as aliens in modern times - based on cultural overlays
